title.en: The sword hurt him, and it hurt him hard!

content.en:
Strictly speaking, a semi-domain weapon is also a forbidden weapon, but it surpasses the top-level forbidden weapon, but it does not reach the level of a domain weapon.

But even so, the half-domain weapon is very precious, and it can release a trace of the power of the domain ancestor, and the increased combat power is very terrifying.

In addition, the semi-domain device is very sharp, and it can easily penetrate the ordinary forbidden body.

I saw that the Qinglong Palace Master was holding a half-domain weapon, the Qinglong Sword, and stabbed at the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor with a sword, no matter how powerful the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor's defensive forbidden Dao technique was, it was also pierced by this sword, and then pierced his body.

The sword hurt him, and it hurt him hard!

The combat power of the Green Dragon Palace Lord holding the Green Dragon Sword skyrocketed, and he already had the real means to kill a half-step domain ancestor, and it was not by relying on time to kill a half-step domain ancestor, but by fighting a half-step domain ancestor head-on in a short period of time.

Even so, the three half-step domain ancestors besieged the Qinglong Palace Lord, but after a long time, the three half-step domain ancestors might fall.

The Zhenyu Dao Ancestor finally understood why the Qinglong Palace Lord was so confident, even if the three of them and a half-step Domain Ancestor arrived, the other party did not take them seriously.

It turned out that there was really a big gap in the strength of the two sides.

"Immediately retreat and agree to our Heavenly Emperor Palace's request, otherwise I wouldn't mind killing a half-step domain ancestor today!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord threatened.

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, Migu Dao Ancestor, and Tianfan Dao Ancestor are all very entangled, when they are in the vast sea realm, there are Hao Hai Ancestors suppressing them above their heads, they dare not be arrogant at all, and they don't even dare to show their faces, just hoping that one day they can rush into the realm of the domain ancestors and be able to sit on an equal footing with the vast sea ancestors.

But they underestimated the difficulty of becoming a domain ancestor, and now they are still far from the domain ancestor level.

I thought that when I came to the realm of Dao Mountain, I could get rid of the jurisdiction of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and from now on I could control my own life, override the rules, and be the one who plays chess.

But they never expected that they still couldn't beat the Qinglong Palace Lord, and they would be threatened by the Qinglong Palace Lord.

They are not reconciled!

Xuan Xuan Ancient Realm.

A large number of Dao Ancestors watched this battle, and they were also shocked by the invincible combat power of the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, and one person suppressed the three half-step domain ancestors, how powerful and terrifying this was!

"Unexpectedly, the three half-step domain ancestors of the Mitian Sect, the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, and the Heavenly Sea Sect could not compete with the Blue Dragon Palace Lord of the Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In this way, even if there were only three palace masters in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the other forces would not be able to compete with the Heavenly Emperor Palace at all.

I just don't know if there will be a half-step domain ancestor in Black Wind Mountain this time.

Just when Ye Tian thought like this, the battle in the turbulence of time and space changed.

Rumble!!!

The space-time turbulence suddenly froze, as if someone had instantly frozen the space-time here, and even the thoughts of many Dao Ancestors were frozen in the space-time turbulence.

This kind of change made many Dao Ancestors panic, and they didn't understand what was going on.

But those more powerful Dao Ancestors knew very well that this was a half-step Domain Ancestor who was proficient in the Forbidden Dao of Time and Space to make a move.

"The first generation of the Time King and the first generation of the Sky King of Black Wind Mountain, are you two?"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord said solemnly.

He could not care about the Temple of Ten Thousand Domains, the Mitian Sect, and the Heavenly Sea Sect, and he could even treat them as ants, but he couldn't ignore the Black Wind Mountain.

Because Black Wind Mountain is an external force, it has existed for too long to even investigate its root cause.

In short, Black Wind Mountain is even older than the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Once, when the Mighty Sea Ancestor was still an invincible Dao Ancestor, the first generation of Time Kings and the first generation of Sky Kings were hidden behind the scenes, and at that time, Black Wind Mountain no longer knew how many generations of kings it had developed.

But when the Haohai Sea Ancestor became a half-step Domain Ancestor and competed for the position of the Realm Lord, the King of Time and the Sky King also appeared, but they were defeated by the Haohai Sea Ancestor, and the two were seriously injured and fled, and they did not know where to go.

Later, the Vast Sea Ancestor took over the position of the Realm Lord, and used the resources of a domain realm to achieve the position of the Domain Ancestor, originally wanting to destroy the Black Wind Mountain, kill the Time King and the Sky King, but he couldn't sense the existence of the Black Wind Mountain's half-step domain ancestor.

Because he was afraid of the mystery of Black Wind Mountain, and Black Wind Mountain did not cause trouble, it was not too much of a threat, so the Vast Sea Ancestor let Black Wind Mountain go.

But now, the King of Time and the King of the Sky have reappeared.

For these two powerful half-step domain ancestors who had fought against the Vast Sea Ancestor, the Blue Dragon Palace Lord had to pay attention to it.

Originally, he expected these two to leave the Vast Sea Realm, so they didn't follow the Domain Boundary Fragment to the Daoshan Realm.

But his guess was wrong, these two are really here!

This is very terrifying, it can hide the exploration of the vast sea ancestor, and the strength of the Black Wind Mountain is unfathomable.

Wow!

Two figures walked out from the depths of the space-time turbulence, they were not wearing masks, because they were no longer the Time Kings and Sky Kings of the Black Wind Mountain.

There will always be only ten kings of Black Wind Mountain, and once they abdicate, they must revert to their original titles.

"Qinglong Palace Master, you can call me Eternal Dao Ancestor!"

The first king spoke.

"Qinglong Palace Master, you can call me the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor!"

The first generation of the Sky King.

"Eternal Dao Ancestor, Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, I know!" The Qinglong Palace Lord nodded slightly, and then asked, "What are the two of you doing here?"

Eternal Dao Ancestor said: "It's nothing, it's just that the Heavenly Emperor Palace orders all the forces to hand over their resources, this behavior is a bit excessive! I think the Heavenly Emperor Palace needs to revoke this rule, what does the Qinglong Palace Lord think?"

"Yes!" The Blue Dragon Palace Lord said with a smile: "But you must defeat me, I will see what the two people who competed with the Vast Sea Ancestor are capable of today?"

A strong battle intent erupted from the Qinglong Palace Lord, and there was a trace of the Domain Ancestor style.

"I'm here to fight the Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor spoke.

As soon as the words fell, the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Blue Dragon Palace Master fought, and the two of them had almost no nonsense.

Thundered!!!

The Great War set off the collapse of the space-time turbulence, and the flow of regions was cut off, almost affecting the operation of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, causing the passage of time in many areas to begin to change.

The Lord of the Green Dragon Palace has the Green Dragon Sword, but the Eternal Dao Ancestor also has a Semi-Domain Weapon-Time Divine Eye!

This Time Depth Eye was integrated into the eyes of the Eternal Dao Ancestor, which could freeze time and space, release the terrifying forbidden time rules, and cooperate with the Eternal Dao Ancestor's forbidden time dao technique, which could make the other half-step domain ancestors in time chaos, and it was very painful to fight.

The Qinglong Palace Lord fought with the Eternal Dao Ancestor, and he also fell into this depressed mood, the other party's attainments in time were too deep, and the forbidden body of the Eternal Dao Ancestor had also reached the level of eighty out of nine, just a little weaker than him.

On the whole, the Eternal Dao Ancestor is a little weaker than him, but he can't help the Eternal Dao Ancestor.

Then.

The Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor also made a move!
